title: ERP-MES Printing (ISA-95)
description: Printing industry overlay for erp-mes-core: flexo press fleet, film/ink materials, Flexibase event code catalog (OGP/BM/POUCH), Zero Pull setup tags, job bag sections
changelog: 1.0.0 - printing industry overlay on erp-mes-core: 5 migrations (Flexibase event code catalog 155 codes OGP/BM/POUCH/MES, printing equipment/materials/segments, demo print order), 3 BFF functions, 3 dashboards, 3 reports, singleton hub

changelog.notes: Initial release: flexo printing overlay on erp-mes-core 1.0.0, certified by ErpMesPrintingOverlayTest cross-bundle scenarios
